title: The Mechanism Dweller
description: This is the tuffest most sigma rizzful aura minecraft horror mod
body:
The Mechanism Dweller

This mod adds the 67 skibidi rizzler the Khaby Lame Mechanism. The Mehansim is a powerful entity that spawns in the dark. once he appears his theme willl bless your ears and The Mechansim will attack you. He has powerful vision and speed.(so tuff)
This is a joke mod, based off the "Dweller" mods.

It also ads many things like:    (as of the newest version 1.6.0)
-The Brainrotted Effect
-The Hand Of The Mechanism (Which is dropped by the monster)
-The Rizzful Enchantment
-The "Daisy Bell" Music Disc (i made it myself so it doesnt have any copyright)

The Mod Is Also on Curseforge:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-mechanism-dweller

NOW PORTED TO FORGE! Enjoy!
